title: SCOM Server Detail
description: Unified server detail view with base OS metrics and role-specific panels for AD/DC, IIS, DHCP, and DNS. Role panels auto-populate when the server has matching performance counters.

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT LEFT(STUFF(me.DisplayName, 1, 3, ''), CHARINDEX('-', STUFF(me.DisplayName, 1, 3, '')) - 1) AS __text, LEFT(STUFF(me.DisplayName, 1, 3, ''), CHARINDEX('-', STUFF(me.DisplayName, 1, 3, '')) - 1) AS __value FROM vManagedEntity me WHERE me.ManagedEntityTypeRowId = 1 AND me.DisplayName LIKE 'VM-%' ORDER BY 1
list.label: Site

list.name: server
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT me.DisplayName AS __text, me.DisplayName AS __value FROM vManagedEntity me WHERE me.ManagedEntityTypeRowId = 1 AND me.DisplayName LIKE 'VM-${site:raw}-%' ORDER BY me.DisplayName
list.label: Server

panels.title: CPU
panels.description: Current CPU utilization from the most recent SCOM raw performance sample.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "CPU %"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Processor Information' AND pr.CounterName = '% Processor Time' AND pri.InstanceName = '_Total'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Memory
panels.description: Current memory utilization from the most recent SCOM raw performance sample.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Memory %"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Memory' AND pr.CounterName = 'PercentMemoryUsed'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Disk Free
panels.description: Current C: drive free space percentage from the most recent SCOM raw performance sample.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Free %"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'LogicalDisk' AND pr.CounterName = '% Free Space' AND pri.InstanceName = 'C:'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Active Alerts
panels.description: Count of unresolved alerts for this server from SCOM alert data.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Alerts"
FROM Alert.vAlert a
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON a.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE a.ResolutionState <> 255
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'

panels.title: CPU & Memory
panels.description: CPU utilization and memory percentage trends from SCOM hourly rollups with warning/critical threshold lines.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pr.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE (
  (pr.ObjectName = 'Processor Information' AND pr.CounterName = '% Processor Time' AND pri.InstanceName = '_Total')
  OR (pr.ObjectName = 'Memory' AND pr.CounterName = 'PercentMemoryUsed')
)
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Disk Free & Queue
panels.description: C: drive free space percentage and processor queue length trends from SCOM hourly rollups.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pr.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE (
  (pr.ObjectName = 'LogicalDisk' AND pr.CounterName = '% Free Space' AND pri.InstanceName = 'C:')
  OR (pr.ObjectName = 'System' AND pr.CounterName = 'Processor Queue Length')
)
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Disk I/O
panels.description: Disk transfer latency and throughput for C: from SCOM hourly rollups.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pr.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'LogicalDisk'
AND pr.CounterName IN ('Avg. Disk sec/Transfer', 'Disk Bytes/sec')
AND pri.InstanceName = 'C:'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Network
panels.description: Network adapter bytes total per second from SCOM hourly rollups.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pri.InstanceName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Network Adapter' AND pr.CounterName = 'Bytes Total/sec'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Kernel Memory
panels.description: Kernel memory pool usage and available page table entries. Declining PTE or growing nonpaged pool can indicate memory leaks.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pr.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Memory'
AND pr.CounterName IN ('Pool Nonpaged Bytes', 'Pool Paged Bytes', 'Free System Page Table Entries')
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Connections
panels.description: Active TCP connections (v4/v6) and SMB server sessions over time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pr.ObjectName + ' - ' + pr.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE ((pr.ObjectName = 'TCPv4' AND pr.CounterName = 'Connections Established')
   OR (pr.ObjectName = 'TCPv6' AND pr.CounterName = 'Connections Established')
   OR (pr.ObjectName = 'Server' AND pr.CounterName = 'Server Sessions'))
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: LDAP Searches/sec
panels.description: Current LDAP search rate from DirectoryServices counters. Empty if server is not a domain controller.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "LDAP Searches/sec"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'DirectoryServices' AND pr.CounterName = 'LDAP Searches/sec'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Kerberos Auth/sec
panels.description: Current Kerberos authentication rate. Empty if server is not a domain controller.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Kerberos Auth/sec"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Security System-Wide Statistics' AND pr.CounterName = 'Kerberos Authentications'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: DNS Queries/sec
panels.description: Current DNS query rate. Empty if server does not run the DNS role.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "DNS Queries/sec"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'DNS' AND pr.CounterName = 'Total Query Received/sec'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: NTLM Auth/sec
panels.description: Current NTLM authentication rate. Empty if server is not a domain controller.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "NTLM Auth/sec"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Security System-Wide Statistics' AND pr.CounterName = 'NTLM Authentications'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Authentication Over Time
panels.description: Kerberos and NTLM authentication trends from SCOM hourly rollups. Empty for non-DC servers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pr.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Security System-Wide Statistics'
AND pr.CounterName IN ('Kerberos Authentications', 'NTLM Authentications')
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: LDAP & DNS Over Time
panels.description: LDAP search rate and DNS query rate trends from SCOM hourly rollups. Empty for non-DC/non-DNS servers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pr.ObjectName + ' - ' + pr.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE (
  (pr.ObjectName = 'DirectoryServices' AND pr.CounterName = 'LDAP Searches/sec')
  OR (pr.ObjectName = 'DNS' AND pr.CounterName = 'Total Query Received/sec')
)
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Connections
panels.description: Current IIS connections from Web Service counters. Empty if server does not run IIS.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Connections"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Web Service' AND pr.CounterName = 'Current Connections'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Requests/sec
panels.description: Current IIS request rate. Empty if server does not run IIS.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Requests/sec"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Web Service' AND pr.CounterName = 'Total Method Requests/sec'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Bandwidth
panels.description: Current IIS bandwidth from Web Service Bytes Total/sec. Empty if server does not run IIS.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Bandwidth"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Web Service' AND pr.CounterName = 'Bytes Total/sec'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: 404 Errors/sec
panels.description: Current IIS 404 error rate. Empty if server does not run IIS.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "404 Errors/sec"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Web Service' AND pr.CounterName = 'Not Found Errors/sec'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Request & Connection Trends
panels.description: IIS request rate and connection count trends from SCOM hourly rollups. Empty for non-IIS servers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pr.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Web Service'
AND pr.CounterName IN ('Total Method Requests/sec', 'Current Connections')
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Error & Bandwidth Trends
panels.description: IIS 404 error rate and bandwidth trends from SCOM hourly rollups. Empty for non-IIS servers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pr.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'Web Service'
AND pr.CounterName IN ('Not Found Errors/sec', 'Bytes Total/sec')
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Requests/sec
panels.description: Current DHCP request rate. Empty if server does not run the DHCP role.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Requests/sec"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'DHCP Server' AND pr.CounterName = 'Requests/sec'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Acks/sec
panels.description: Current DHCP acknowledgment rate. Empty if server does not run the DHCP role.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Acks/sec"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'DHCP Server' AND pr.CounterName = 'Acks/sec'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: Queue Length
panels.description: Current DHCP active queue length. Empty if server does not run the DHCP role.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 1 ph.AverageValue AS "Queue Length"
FROM Perf.vPerfRaw ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'DHCP Server' AND pr.CounterName = 'Active Queue Length'
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY ph.DateTime DESC

panels.title: DHCP Activity Over Time
panels.description: DHCP request, acknowledgment, and discover trends from SCOM hourly rollups. Empty for non-DHCP servers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ph.DateTime AS time,
  pr.CounterName AS metric,
  ph.AverageValue AS value
FROM Perf.vPerfHourly ph
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRuleInstance pri ON ph.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId = pri.PerformanceRuleInstanceRowId
INNER JOIN vPerformanceRule pr ON pri.RuleRowId = pr.RuleRowId
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON ph.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
WHERE pr.ObjectName = 'DHCP Server'
AND pr.CounterName IN ('Requests/sec', 'Acks/sec', 'Discovers/sec')
AND me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
AND $__timeFilter(ph.DateTime)
ORDER BY ph.DateTime

panels.title: Maintenance History
panels.description: Historical maintenance mode entries for the selected server, including planned vs unplanned classification and operator comments.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  mm.StartDateTime AS "Start",
  mm.EndDateTime AS "End",
  mmh.Comment AS "Reason",
  mmh.UserId AS "Set By",
  CASE mm.PlannedMaintenanceInd WHEN 1 THEN 'Planned' ELSE 'Unplanned' END AS "Type"
FROM dbo.vMaintenanceMode mm
INNER JOIN vManagedEntity me ON mm.ManagedEntityRowId = me.ManagedEntityRowId
LEFT JOIN dbo.vMaintenanceModeHistory mmh ON mm.MaintenanceModeRowId = mmh.MaintenanceModeRowId
WHERE me.DisplayName = '${server:raw}'
ORDER BY mm.StartDateTime DESC

panels.title: Recent Events
panels.description: Warning and critical events from the Windows event log for the selected server within the dashboard time range.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT TOP 20
  e.DateTime AS "Time",
  el.EventLevelName AS "Level",
  ep.EventPublisherName AS "Source",
  e.EventDisplayNumber AS "Event ID",
  e.RawDescription AS "Description"
FROM Event.vEvent e
INNER JOIN dbo.vEventPublisher ep ON e.EventPublisherRowId = ep.EventPublisherRowId
INNER JOIN dbo.vEventLevel el ON e.EventLevelId = el.EventLevelId
INNER JOIN dbo.vEventLoggingComputer elc ON e.LoggingComputerRowId = elc.LoggingComputerRowId
WHERE elc.LoggingComputerName = '${server:raw}'
AND el.EventLevelId <= 2
AND $__timeFilter(e.DateTime)
ORDER BY e.DateTime DESC
